generators.label: EDS Block

files.content:
# ${blockName}

EDS block. Author it by creating a table whose first cell names the block (`${blockName}`).

| ${blockName} |
| ------------ |
| content      |

- `${blockName}.js` — `decorate(block)` default export, runs at render.
- `${blockName}.css` — styles scoped to `.${blockName}`.

generators.postNote: Add the block to a document by naming a table after it. The decorate() default export receives the block element.
